evals.prompt: I have a .NET Android app using ZXing.Net.Mobile for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with BarcodeCapture. Here is my activity: ZxingActivity.cs
evals.expected_output: Removes all ZXing.Net.Mobile APIs (MobileBarcodeScanner, MobileBarcodeScanningOptions, ZXing.BarcodeFormat), adds BarcodeCapture integration with matching symbologies (Ean13Upca, Code128, Qr), and preserves the ScannedBarcode record and deduplication logic.

assertions.text: ZXing.Mobile / ZXing using directives are NOT present in the output
MobileBarcodeScanner is NOT instantiated in the new code (may appear in a before/after summary table)
MobileBarcodeScanningOptions is NOT present in the new code
Scandit.DataCapture using directives ARE present
The Activity implements IBarcodeCaptureListener (or subscribes to BarcodeScanned via EventHandler<BarcodeCaptureEventArgs>)
Symbology.Ean13Upca is enabled
Symbology.Code128 is enabled
Symbology.Qr is enabled (not Symbology.QrCode, which does not exist)
Symbology.QrCode does NOT appear as a Symbology enum value (BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE in a summary table is acceptable)
DataCaptureView.Create( is used
BarcodeCaptureOverlay.Create( is called
OnResume turns the camera on (SwitchToDesiredStateAsync(FrameSourceState.On))
OnPause turns the camera off (SwitchToDesiredStateAsync(FrameSourceState.Off))
ScannedBarcode record is preserved in output
scannedBarcodes list is preserved in output
Deduplication logic (checking for existing value before adding) is preserved
A summary of changes is shown with what was removed and what was added
Setup checklist mentions Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode as a NuGet package
Setup checklist mentions Scandit.DataCapture.Core as a NuGet package
A concrete version number is used for the dependencies (not a [version] placeholder)
Setup checklist mentions the camera permission (CAMERA or AndroidManifest)
